# SealQ by QILI Electronics

## Company
- Brand: SealQ™
- Parent: QILI Electronics (七力电子), Shenzhen, China
- Founded: 2015
- Factory: 3,000 m², injection + assembly + QC in-house (Longhua, Shenzhen)
- Exporting to 30+ countries

## Products
- PVS-02 Handheld Vacuum Sealer: Φ48×195mm, 210g bare / 350g retail box, -60 kPa, USB-C DC5V/1A 5W, 1200 mAh Li-ion, ~2h charge, ~40min/charge, <60dB, ABS + food-grade silicone pearl white, CE/RoHS/FCC
- Vacuum Sealer Bags: 7-layer PA/PE co-extruded, 90-110 microns, BPA-free, food-grade, FDA/EU compliant, -20°C~100°C
  - VSB-S30/S50: Small 22×21 cm (30/50-pk)
  - VSB-M30: Medium 26×28 cm, 900g/30-pk
  - VSB-L50: Large 26×34 cm, 1800g/50-pk
  - PVS-02-SK30 Starter Kit: sealer + 10S+10M+10L, ~1100g
- Rolls: custom widths available

## Wholesale Terms
- MOQ: 500 pcs (sealer, flexible down); custom for bags
- Lead time: 7-day samples, 25-30 days mass production
- Payment: T/T 30% deposit, 70% before shipment; L/C for $20K+; PayPal/WU for samples
- Shipping: FOB Shenzhen/Ningbo/Shanghai; sea(25-35d)/air(5-7d)/rail to EU/CIS(15-20d); DDP Russia available
- OEM/ODM: custom color, logo, packaging, firmware; exclusive molds
- Warranty: 1 year

## Certifications
- CE, RoHS, FCC (standard, in-box docs)
- LFGB food contact for bags (on request)
- EAC for Russia/CIS (in progress)
- EU Authorized Representative, LUCID packaging (on request)

- Email: jasonyuan866@gmail.com
- Sales: Jason Yuan (Export Manager)
- WhatsApp/Telegram: on request
- Site: https://go.freshlocksealer.com
